---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.pub-controls {
  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
}
.filter-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.filter-btn {
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 2rem;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.85rem;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #666;
  transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.filter-btn i { font-size: 0.78rem; margin-right: 0.25rem; }
.filter-btn:hover:not(.active) { border-color: #111; color: #111; }
.filter-btn.active { background: #111; color: #fff; border-color: #111; }

.pub-search {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 420px;
  padding: 0.38rem 0.8rem;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 0.3rem;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.15s;
  background: #fff;
  color: #111;
}
.pub-search:focus { border-color: #111; }
.pub-count {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #bbb;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.pub-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; }

.pub-item {
  padding: 0.85rem 0.75rem 0.85rem 1rem;
  border-left: 2px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #efefef;
  background: #fff;
  transition: background 0.12s, border-left-color 0.12s;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.pub-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.pub-item:hover {
  background: #fafafa;
  border-left-color: #111;
}

.pub-meta-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.3rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.28rem;
}
.pub-icon {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #black;
}
.pub-badge {
  font-size: 0.64rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.09em;
  color: #black;
}
/* Override coloured badges — keep classes for JS targeting */
.badge-article, .badge-book, .badge-chapter, .badge-report {
  background: none;
  color: #black;
  padding: 0;
  border-radius: 0;
}
.pub-sep {
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  color: #black;
  user-select: none;
}
.pub-year {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #black;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.pub-title-link {
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1.45;
  color: #111;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.pub-title-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; color: #000; }
.pub-title-text {
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1.45;
  color: #333;
}
.pub-authors {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: #555;
  margin-top: 0.18rem;
}
.pub-venue {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: #black;
  font-style: italic;
  margin-top: 0.06rem;
}
.pub-hidden { display: none; }
</style>

<div class="pub-controls">
  <div class="filter-group">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-value="all">All</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-value="article"><i class="bi bi-file-text"></i>Journal Articles</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-value="book"><i class="bi bi-book"></i>Books</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-value="chapter"><i class="bi bi-bookmark"></i>Book Chapters</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" data-value="report"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i>Reports &amp; Working Papers</button>
  </div>
  <input class="pub-search" type="text" id="pubSearch" placeholder="Search by title, author, or journal…" autocomplete="off">
  <p class="pub-count" id="pubCount"></p>
</div>

<ul class="pub-list" id="pubList">

  <!-- 2026 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2026">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2026</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/399791527_Redesigning_choice_to_tackle_school_segregation_The_impact_of_Barcelona's_desegregation_policies?_sg%5B0%5D=z_v3lYyr6qKCETNwFbHpZuj9Bz45wJkFEtr1P50aUcERU4HCXgQiyqb1e5NjYY_LFa65fOKDt1li10vd3HI7ABqQHAe0ZTpzdFVF-gqs.WWeo0fmMguMYRdz2K0SYn0y_Awh8Olek7rhI1FXMm3futQyn_NcJSJq4wPsCmkPGRelspmO3yw0t3d_sdfKT2Q&_tp=eyJjb250ZXh0Ijp7ImZpcnN0UGFnZSI6ImhvbWUiLCJwYWdlIjoicHJvZmlsZSIsInByZXZpb3VzUGFnZSI6InByb2ZpbGUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6InBhZ2VDb250ZW50In19" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Redesigning choice to tackle school segregation: the impact of Barcelona's desegregation policies</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., González Motos, S., &amp; Quilabert, E.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Policy Studies</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2026">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2026</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/400050856_Education_markets_and_socio-spatial_inequalities_the_role_of_geography" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Education markets and socio-spatial inequalities: the role of geography</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., &amp; Bonal, X.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In P. Kraftl, S. L. Holloway, Y. Cheng, &amp; S. R. Kučerová (Eds.), <em>Handbook on Geographies of Education</em> (pp. 318–332). Edward Elgar.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2026">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2026</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.bloomsburycollections.com/monograph-detail?docid=b-9781350520554&tocid=b-9781350520554-chapter3" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Education Policies amid Covid-19: Long-Term responses in Europe</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In M.C. Azaola (Ed.), <em>Global Perspectives on Recovery from Learning Disruption</em> (pp. 45–68). Bloomsbury Academic.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2025 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2025">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2025</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/00220620.2025.2538455" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Examining pro-equity redesigns of educational quasi-markets: a mechanism-based approach to their effects</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Fontdevila, C., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Journal of Educational Administration and History, 1–20</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2025">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2025</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.elgaronline.com/edcollbook/book/9781035311385/9781035311385.xml" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Research handbook on education privatization and marketization</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Fontdevila, C., Jabbar, H., &amp; Verger, A. (Eds.)</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Edward Elgar Publishing</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2025">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2025</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.elgaronline.com/edcollchap/book/9781035311385/chapter1.xml" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Education privatization and marketization: New spaces and research directions</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Fontdevila, C., Verger, A., &amp; Jabbar, H.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In Zancajo et al. (Eds.), <em>Research Handbook on Education Privatization and Marketization</em> (pp. 1–24). Edward Elgar.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2025">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2025</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/389833614_Taking_stock_looking_ahead_new_developments_and_approaches_to_education_privatization_and_marketization_research" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Taking stock, looking ahead: new developments and approaches to education privatization and marketization research</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Fontdevila, C., Verger, A., Zancajo, A., &amp; Jabbar, H.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In Zancajo et al. (Eds.), <em>Research Handbook on Education Privatization and Marketization</em> (pp. 470–487). Edward Elgar.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2025">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2025</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/docs/6/m/r/wh0-politiquesdesegregacioescolarabarcelona_adriazacncajo_2aed.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Les polítiques de desegregació escolar a Barcelona: avenços i reptes pendents</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., González Motos, S., Jover, A., Llos, B., Manzano, M., Pagès, M., Parcerisa, L., &amp; Quilabert, E.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2025">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2025</span></div>
       <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/398815733_Estudi_de_l%27impacte_de_la_zonificacio_escolar_a_Tarragona" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Estudi de l'impacte de la zonificació escolar a Tarragona</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A. &amp; Martínez, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue"></div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2024 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2024">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2024</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/epdf/10.1080/0161956X.2024.2381393?needAccess=true" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Catholic Schools in the Marketplace: Changing and Enduring Religious Identities</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Fontdevila, C., Zancajo, A., &amp; Verger, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Peabody Journal of Education, 99(4), 464–481</div>
    </div>
  </li>
  
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2024">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2024</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/docs/v/3/a/zac-early-leaving310725_2.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Dropping out in Academicand Vocational Upper SecondaryEducation</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., &amp; Bueno, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2024">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2024</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/docs/a/k/2/nbn-abandonamentbatxcicleformatius_061124.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">L'abandonament al batxillerat i als cicles formatius de grau mitjà</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., &amp; Bueno, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2024">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2024</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.routledge.com/Lifelong-Education-Policies-in-Europe-and-Latin-America/Rambla-Milana/p/book/9781032651842" target="_blank" rel= "nonopener">The coordination of skill supply and demand in the market model of skill formation: testing the assumptions for the case of Chile</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Valiente, O., Zancajo, A., &amp; Jacovkis, J.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In <em>Lifelong Education Policies in Europe and Latin America</em> (pp. 90–103). Routledge.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2024">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2024</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://nepc.colorado.edu/review/learning" target="_blank" rel="noopener">NEPC Review: Spark &amp; Sustain — How All the World's School Systems Can Improve Learning at Scale</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Fontdevila, C., Verger, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">National Education Policy Center</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2023 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2023">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2023</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://epaa.asu.edu/index.php/epaa/article/view/8031/3120" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Regional policy trajectories in the Spanish education system: Different uses of relative autonomy</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., Pagès, M., Verger, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Education Policy Analysis Archives, 31(68)</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2023">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2023</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/epdf/10.1080/13636820.2021.1973543?needAccess=true" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Understanding aspirations: why do secondary TVET students aim so high in Chile?</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Aldinucci, A., Valiente, O., Hurrell, S., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Journal of Vocational Education &amp; Training, 75(4), 788–809</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2023">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2023</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/docs/w/b/l/15d-abandonament_zancajobueno020523.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">L'abandonament a 4t d'ESO: les desigualtats en la transició a l'educació postobligatòria</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., &amp; Bueno, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2023">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2023</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/365585540_The_World_Bank_and_education_in_a_changing_global_arena" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The World Bank and education in a changing global arena</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In R. J. Tierney, F. Rizvi, &amp; K. Ercikan (Eds.), <em>International Encyclopedia of Education</em> (4th ed., pp. 480–487). Elsevier.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2023">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2023</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/365607858_The_privatization_of_education_Drivers_social_effects_and_regulatory_challenges_of_private_sector_participation_in_schooling" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The privatization of education: Drivers, social effects and regulatory challenges of private sector participation in schooling</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In R. J. Tierney, F. Rizvi, &amp; K. Ercikan (Eds.), <em>International Encyclopedia of Education</em> (4th ed., pp. 174–182). Elsevier.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2023">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2023</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/372472164_Markets_in_Education_and_School_Segregation_Paths_of_Problematization_and_Reform" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Markets in Education and School Segregation: Paths of Problematization and Reform</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Verger, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In M. Verhoeven, J. Corvalán, V. Dupriez, &amp; J.P. Valenzuela (Eds.), <em>Education Markets and Segregation</em> (pp. 81–101). Springer.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2023">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2023</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/369184660_Desigualdades_socioespaciales_en_la_educacion_en_Euskadi" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Desigualdades socioespaciales en la educación en Euskadi</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., Ferrer, G., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Instituto Vasco de Investigación y Evaluación Educativa</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2023">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2023</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.academia.edu/122370818/Governing_Public_Private_Partnerships_in_Education_Contemporary_Debates_and_Pro_Equity_Regulatory_Trends" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Governing Public-Private Partnerships in Education: Contemporary Debates and Pro-Equity Regulatory Trends</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue"></div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2022 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2022">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2022</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/epub/10.1177/14749041211023339" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The instrumentation of public subsidies for private schools: Different regulatory models with concurrent equity implications</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Verger, A., &amp; Fontdevila, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">European Educational Research Journal, 21(1), 44–70</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2022">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2022</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://revistas.uam.es/jospoe/article/view/14352/14758" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Las Alianzas Público-Privadas en educación: debates, modelos y horizontes regulativos en los países de la OCDE</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Verger, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Journal of Supranational Policies of Education, 15, 6–32</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2022">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2022</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/347422570_Education_markets_and_school_segregation_a_mechanism-based_explanation" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Education markets and school segregation: a mechanism-based explanation</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., &amp; Bonal, X.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Compare: A Journal of Comparative and International Education, 52(8), 1241–1258</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2022">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2022</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/epdf/10.1002/psp.2542" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Opting out of neighbourhood schools: The role of local education markets in student mobility</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Scandurra, R., Zancajo, A., &amp; Bonal, X.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Population, Space and Place, 28(5), e2542</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2022">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2022</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://academic.oup.com/policyandsociety/article-pdf/41/1/111/46878820/puab016.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Digitalization and beyond: the effects of Covid-19 on post-pandemic educational policy and delivery in Europe</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Verger, A., &amp; Bolea, P.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Policy and Society, 41(1), 111–128</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2022">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2022</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/docs/d/n/j/97z-laeducacionconcertada_281122_zancajovergerfontdevila.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">La educación concertada en España: Reformas en clave de equidad desde una perspectiva internacional</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Verger, A., &amp; Fontdevila, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2022">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2022</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/docs/v/l/l/lgb-pol90_concertada_040422.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">La concertada a debat: Reformes contra les desigualtats educatives des d'una mirada internacional i comparada</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Verger, A., &amp; Fontdevila, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2022">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2022</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/359603963_Educational_Privatization_Expanding_spaces_and_new_global_regulatory_trends_in_educational_privatization" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Educational Privatization: Expanding spaces and new global regulatory trends</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Verger, A., &amp; Fontdevila, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In F. Rizvi, B. Lingard, &amp; R. Rinne (Eds.), <em>Reimagining Globalization and Education</em> (pp. 105–119). Routledge.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2021 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2021">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2021</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://bera-journals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/epdf/10.1002/berj.3694" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Student mobility and school segregation in an (un)controlled choice system: A counterfactual approach</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., Zancajo, A., &amp; Scandurra, R.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">British Educational Research Journal, 47(1), 42–64</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2021">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2021</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/epdf/10.1080/13636820.2020.1833076?needAccess=true" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Development paradigms in the institutional configuration of vocational education and training in Chile (1964–2005)</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Valiente, O., Sepúlveda, L., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Journal of Vocational Education &amp; Training, 73(2), 278–294</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2021">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2021</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://unesdoc.unesco.org/ark:/48223/pf0000380092" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Regulating Public-Private Partnerships, governing non-state schools: An equity perspective</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Fontdevila, C., Verger, A., &amp; Bonal, X.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Background paper for the 2021 Global Education Monitoring Report, UNESCO</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2021">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2021</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.thebritishacademy.ac.uk/documents/3226/COVID-decade-The-impact-on-education-Rapid-review-Adrian-Zancajo-Glasgow.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The impact of the Covid-19 pandemic on education: Rapid review of the literature</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">COVID-19 and Society project, British Academy</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2020 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2020">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2020</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://revistas.uam.es/reice/article/view/reice2020_18_4_008/12569" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Elección de escuela, movilidad y segregación escolar del alumnado vulnerable en Barcelona</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">REICE: Revista Iberoamericana sobre Calidad, Eficacia y Cambio en Educación, 18(4), 197–218</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2020">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2020</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/epub/10.1177/0895904819881781" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Schools in the Marketplace: Analysis of School Supply Responses in the Chilean Education Market</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Educational Policy, 34(1), 43–64</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2020">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2020</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/epdf/10.1080/02601370.2019.1678692?needAccess=true" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The coordination of skill supply and demand in the market model of skill formation: testing the assumptions for the case of Chile</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Valiente, O., Zancajo, A., &amp; Jacovkis, J.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">International Journal of Lifelong Education, 39(1), 90–103</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2020">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2020</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Private sector participation in education: where it occurs, and why</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Zancajo, A., &amp; Fontdevila, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">GEM Report UNESCO, World Education Blog</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2019 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2019">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2019</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/335840990_Residential_segregation_and_school_segregation_of_foreign_students_in_Barcelona" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Residential segregation and school segregation of foreign students in Barcelona</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., Zancajo, A., &amp; Scandurra, R.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Urban Studies, 56(15), 3251–3273</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2019">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2019</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://epaa.asu.edu/index.php/epaa/article/view/4318/2325" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Education markets and schools' mechanisms of exclusion: The case of Chile</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Education Policy Analysis Archives, 27(130)</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2019">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2019</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/epdf/10.1080/13636820.2018.1548500?needAccess=true" target="_blank" rel="noopener">TVET policy reforms in Chile 2006–2018: between human capital and the right to education</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., &amp; Valiente, O.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Journal of Vocational Education &amp; Training, 71(4), 579–599</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2019">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2019</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://books.google.es/books?id=K5XIDwAAQBAJ&printsec=frontcover" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Evolución de las políticas de ETP en Chile: entre el capital humano y el derecho a la educación</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., &amp; Valiente, O.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In L. Sepúlveda &amp; M.J. Valdebenito (Eds.), <em>Educación Técnico Profesional ¿Hacia dónde vamos?</em>. Ediciones Universidad Alberto Hurtado.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2019">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2019</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://ncspe.tc.columbia.edu/working-papers/files/WP239.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Drivers and Resistances to Regulation of Education Markets: The Political Economy of the Chilean Reform</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Working Paper 239, National Center for the Study of Privatization in Education, Teachers College, Columbia University</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2019">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2019</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.edubcn.cat/rcs_gene/extra/01_documents_de_referencia/Equivalencia_BCN_final_v2_20190320.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Equivalència territorial en la planificació educativa a Barcelona: Diagnòstic i propostes</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Consorci d'Educació de Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2019">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2019</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.academia.edu/41268608/Lescolaritzaci%C3%B3_a_Tarragona_diagn%C3%B2stic_i_propostes_dequitat_educativa" target="_blank" rel="noopener">L'escolarització a Tarragona: diagnòstic i propostes d'equitat educativa</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue"></div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2018 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2018">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2018</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/323490216_Demand_rationalities_in_contexts_of_poverty_Do_the_Poor_respond_to_market_incentives_in_the_same_way" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Demand rationalities in contexts of poverty: Do the Poor respond to market incentives in the same way?</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">International Journal of Educational Development, 59, 20–27</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2018">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2018</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/321063384_Educational_providers_in_the_marketplace_Schools'_marketing_responses_in_Chile" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Educational providers in the marketplace: Schools' marketing responses in Chile</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">International Journal of Educational Research, 88, 166–176</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2018">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2018</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Is there real freedom of school choice? An analysis from a study in Chile</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Mediavilla, M., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">International Journal of Educational Reform, 27(1), 86–103</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2018">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2018</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/346835932_School_Segregation_in_the_Spanish_Quasi-market_Education_System_Local_Dynamics_and_Policy_Absences" target="_blank" rel="noopener">School segregation in the Spanish quasi-market education system: local dynamics and policy absences</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In X. Bonal &amp; C. Bellei (Eds.), <em>Understanding School Segregation</em> (pp. 201–220). Bloomsbury.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2018">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2018</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.academia.edu/37900928/Experimenting_with_educational_development_international_actors_and_the_promotion_of_private_schooling_in_vulnerable_contexts" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Experimenting with educational development: International actors and the promotion of private schooling in vulnerable contexts</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Zancajo, A., &amp; Fontdevila, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In G. Steiner-Khamsi &amp; A. Draxler (Eds.), <em>The State, Business and Education: PPPs Revisited</em> (pp. 16–38). Edward Elgar.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2018">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2018</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Constructing low-fee private schools as an educational model for the Global South: From local origins to transnational dynamics</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In A. Verger, H.K. Altinyelken, &amp; M. Novelli (Eds.), <em>Global Education Policy and International Development</em> (2nd ed., pp. 255–276). Bloomsbury Academic.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2017 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2017">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2017</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/316196658_Multiple_paths_towards_education_privatization_in_a_globalizing_world_a_cultural_political_economy_review" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Multiple paths towards education privatization in a globalizing world: A cultural political economy review</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Journal of Education Policy, 32(6), 757–787</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2017">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2017</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/313660554_Making_Poor_Choices_Demand_Rationalities_and_School_Choice_in_a_Chilean_Local_Education_Market" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Making poor choices? Demand rationalities and school choice in a Chilean local education market</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., Verger, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Journal of School Choice, 11(2), 258–281</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2017">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2017</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-658-17104-9_13" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Taking advantage of catastrophes: education privatization reforms in contexts of emergency</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Fontdevila, C., Verger, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In T. Koinzer, R. Nikolai, &amp; F. Waldow (Eds.), <em>Private Schools and School Choice in Compulsory Education</em> (pp. 223–244). Springer VS.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2017">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2017</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Privatization by Default in Low-Income Countries: The emergence and Expansion of Low-Fee Private Schools</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In A. Verger, H.K. Altinyelken, &amp; M. Novelli (Eds.), <em>Global Education Policy and International Development</em> (2nd ed., pp. 255–276). Bloomsbury Academic.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2016 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2016">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2016</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="http://educa.fcc.org.br/pdf/lc/v22n49/1981-0431-lc-22-49-00532.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">La formación profesional en España: efectos sobre la empleabilidad en tiempos de crisis</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Valiente, O., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Linhas Críticas, 22(49), 532–551</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2016">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2016</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.raco.cat/index.php/RECAT/article/download/389613/483030" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Formació professional i ocupabilitat a Catalunya</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Valiente, O., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Revista econòmica de Catalunya, 74, 51–60</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2016">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2016</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://revistas.pedagogica.edu.co/index.php/RCE/article/view/3764/3345" target="_blank" rel="noopener">La economía política de la privatización educativa: políticas, tendencias y trayectorias desde una perspectiva</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Zancajo, A., &amp; Fontdevila, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Revista colombiana de educación, 70, 47–78</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2016">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2016</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/299472482_What_Are_the_Role_and_Impact_of_Public-Private_Partnerships_in_Education_A_Realist_Evaluation_of_the_Chilean_Education_Quasi-Market" target="_blank" rel="noopener">What are the role and impact of public-private partnerships in education? A realist evaluation of the Chilean education quasi-market</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Comparative Education Review, 60(2), 223–248</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2016">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2016</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.redalyc.org/articulo.oa?id=275043450052" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Recontextualización de políticas y (cuasi) mercados educativos: un análisis de las dinámicas de demanda y oferta escolar en Chile</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Education Policy Analysis Archives, 24, 27</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2016">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2016</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/313750984_Educacio_pobresa_i_desigualtats_en_un_context_de_crisi" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Educació, pobresa i desigualtats en un context de crisi</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Nota d'economia, 103, 91–103</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2016">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2016</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="http://download.ei-ie.org/Docs/WebDepot/The_Privatization_of_Education.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The Privatization of Education: A Political Economy Approach to Global Education Reform</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Fontdevila, C., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Teachers College Press, New York</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2015 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2015">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2015</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/epub/10.1177/1474904115592489" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Educational differentiation policies and the performance of disadvantaged students across OECD countries</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Castejón, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">European Educational Research Journal, 14(3–4), 222–239</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2015">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2015</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Inclusión, desigualdades y diversidad en la educación obligatoria: retos para el sistema educativo español y evidencias internacionales</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Castejón, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Organización y gestión educativa: Revista del Fórum Europeo de Administradores de la Educación, 23(1), 20–24</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2015">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2015</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/docs/y/a/b/f/e/y/9/7/c/informesbreu60_xavierbonal.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Equitat i resultats educatius a Catalunya: Una mirada a partir de PISA-2012</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., Castejon, A., Zancajo, A., &amp; Castel, J.L.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2015">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2015</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/sites/default/files/607.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Un model de formació professional dual per a Catalunya? Reptes en el disseny i implementació de la reforma</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Valiente, O., Scandurra, R., Zancajo, A., &amp; Brown, C.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2015">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2015</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://www.opensocietyfoundations.org/sites/default/files/verger-indicatiors-broad-bold-20150520.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Indicators for a Broad and Bold Post-2015 Agenda: A Comprehensive Approach to Educational Development</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Verger, A., Bonal, X., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Open Society Foundations</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2015">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2015</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Is there real freedom of school choice? An analysis from Chile</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Mediavilla, M., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">IEB Working Paper</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2015">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2015</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Public-private partnerships in Colombian education: the equity and quality implications of Colegios en Concesión</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Termes, A., Bonal, X., Verger, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Privatisation in Education Research Initiative, 66, 1–7</div>
    </div>
  </li>


  <!-- 2014 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2014">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2014</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://dialnet.unirioja.es/servlet/articulo?codigo=5035678&orden=0&info=link" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Mercados educativos y segmentación de la oferta escolar: efectos sobre las desigualdades educativas en Chile</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Bonal, X., &amp; Verger, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Témpora: Revista de historia y sociología de la educación, 17, 11–30</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2014">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2014</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/old-files/Politiques%2082_WEB_seg.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">La Formació professional i l'ocupació a Catalunya: Una ullada als indicadors des d'una perspectiva comparada</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Valiente, O., Zancajo, A., &amp; Tarriño, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2014">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2014</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Un model de formació professional dual per a Catalunya? Reptes en el disseny i implementació de la reforma</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Scandurra, R., Valiente, O., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Fundació Jaume Bofill, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2013 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2013">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2013</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://ddd.uab.cat/pub/caplli/2013/171177/enqjovcat_a2013v1p77.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Joventut i educació en temps de crisi</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Ferrer, F., Castejón, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In P. Serracant (Ed.), <em>Enquesta de joventut de Catalunya 2012</em> (pp. 77–116). Departament de Benestar i Família.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2012 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2012">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2012</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Los resultados PISA-2009: una mirada sobre las desigualdades educativas en Europa</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Zancajo, A., Castejón, A., &amp; Ferrer, F.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Revista Española de Educación Comparada, 19</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2012">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2012</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Desigualdad social y resilencia académica</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Ferrer i Julià, F., Zancajo, A., &amp; Castejón, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Cuadernos de pedagogía, 425, 58–62</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="chapter" data-year="2012">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-chapter">Chapter</span><span class="pub-year">2012</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">El benestar als centres educatius a Catalunya: una anàlisi del projecte PISA-2009 des de la perspectiva dels estudiants i directors</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Castejón, A., Zancajo, A., &amp; Ferrer i Julià, F.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">In <em>El benestar a l'escola i en el professorat. L'estat de l'educació a Catalunya. Anuari 2011</em> (pp. 103–129). Fundació Jaume Bofill.</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="report" data-year="2012">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><span class="pub-year">2012</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">The measure of educational progress: state of the art and a new index proposal</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Bonal, X., Verger, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">UNESCO Division of Planning and Development of Education Systems</div>
    </div>
  </li>


  <!-- 2011 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2011">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2011</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Educational inequalities and success in Asian countries in PISA 2009</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Castejón, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Foro de Educación, 9(13), 53–69</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2011">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2011</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Informe Pisa: los datos internacionales, ¿qué hay de nuevo?</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Castejón, A., Castel, J.L., Ferrer, F., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Cuadernos de Pedagogía, 413, 50–53</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="pub-item" data-type="book" data-year="2011">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-book">Book</span><span class="pub-year">2011</span></div>
      <a class="pub-title-link" href="https://fundaciobofill.cat/uploads/docs/a/3/y/8/b/q/c/2/k/546.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PISA-2009: Avaluació de les desigualtats educatives a Catalunya</a>
      <div class="pub-authors">Ferrer, F., Castel, J.L., Castejón, A., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Editorial Mediterrània, Barcelona</div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- 2010 -->
  <li class="pub-item" data-type="article" data-year="2010">
    <div>
      <div class="pub-meta-top"><span class="pub-badge badge-article">Article</span><span class="pub-year">2010</span></div>
      <span class="pub-title-text">Descomposición del efecto inmigrante en el rendimiento académico en Cataluña según la zona origen</span>
      <div class="pub-authors">Oliveres, M.F., &amp; Zancajo, A.</div>
      <div class="pub-venue">Investigaciones de Economía de la Educación, 5, 101–116</div>
    </div>
  </li>

</ul>

<script>
(function () {
  /* Inject type icons into each item */
  var typeIcons = {
    article: 'bi-file-text',
    book:    'bi-book',
    chapter: 'bi-bookmark',
    report:  'bi-file-earmark-text'
  };
  document.querySelectorAll('.pub-item').forEach(function (item) {
    var badge = item.querySelector('.pub-badge');
    if (badge && typeIcons[item.dataset.type]) {
      var icon = document.createElement('i');
      icon.className = 'bi ' + typeIcons[item.dataset.type] + ' pub-icon';
      badge.parentNode.insertBefore(icon, badge);
      var sep = document.createElement('span');
      sep.className = 'pub-sep';
      sep.textContent = '·';
      badge.parentNode.insertBefore(sep, badge.nextSibling);
    }
  });

  const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
  const searchInput = document.getElementById('pubSearch');
  const items = document.querySelectorAll('.pub-item');
  const countEl = document.getElementById('pubCount');
  let activeType = 'all';

  function update() {
    const q = searchInput.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    let n = 0;
    items.forEach(function (item) {
      const typeMatch = activeType === 'all' || item.dataset.type === activeType;
      const textMatch = !q || item.textContent.toLowerCase().includes(q);
      if (typeMatch && textMatch) {
        item.classList.remove('pub-hidden');
        n++;
      } else {
        item.classList.add('pub-hidden');
      }
    });
    countEl.textContent = n + ' of ' + items.length + ' publications';
  }

  buttons.forEach(function (btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
      buttons.forEach(function (b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
      btn.classList.add('active');
      activeType = btn.dataset.value;
      update();
    });
  });

  searchInput.addEventListener('input', update);
  update();
})();
</script>
```
